name: Crazy Taxi
post_apply_message:
Crazy Taxi (SEGA, 2014 re-release — delisted over expired music licensing) — Apply points the shortcut at the 2014 build and loads its patches.

WHY THE WHITE SCREEN + CRASH: the 2014 build relies on SilentPatch (SilentPatchCT.asi) and a Dreamcast Restoration mod (CT-DC.asi), both loaded through a dinput8.dll Ultimate ASI Loader. SilentPatch is what stops it crashing on modern systems — and Wine won't load that local dinput8.dll unless told to, so without the override the game hits a white screen and dies. The shortcut therefore carries WINEDLLOVERRIDES="dinput8=n,b" and points at 2014/Crazy Taxi.exe (NOT AppLauncher.exe, and NOT the data-only 2002 folder) with the working dir set to 2014.

ALREADY DEPLOYED IT AS A PLAIN GAME? It picked the wrong exe / no override. Re-scan so it maps to this recipe, then 🔧 Apply Fixes to rewrite the shortcut — or just re-deploy.

IF IT STILL CRASHES: PROTON_LOG=1 is on the shortcut, so launch, quit, run 🔍 Scan, and I'll read the log for dinput8/SilentPatch to confirm the ASI loaded. Performance option: the repack ships DXVK 2.3 in 2014/Vulkan/ (copy its d3d9.dll into 2014/) — but Proton already provides DXVK, so try without first.

CONTROLLER: native pad support — Steam Input's gamepad layout works.
notes:
Built 2026-07-21 after Tony hit a white-screen crash deploying it as a simple game. Repack (magipacks, 'Repack Notes.txt') bundles a 2002 edition (data-only .afs in 2002/, no exe in this pack) and the 2014 edition (build 403161) in 2014/. Delisted from Steam: the repack restores the Dreamcast music because the PC version's licensed music (Offspring/Bad Religion) expired — the reason SEGA pulled it — so it's the delisted/abandonware lane, not a current-sale title (steam_api.dll + steam_appid.txt are the delisted Steam build + emu).

Launch = 2014/Crazy Taxi.exe, working dir 2014. SilentPatchCT.asi + CT-DC.asi load via 2014/dinput8.dll (Ultimate ASI Loader) — hence WINEDLLOVERRIDES="dinput8=n,b"; without it SilentPatch doesn't run and the game white-screens/crashes (same ASI-loader pattern as Turok). PROTON_LOG=1 to confirm the loader. DXVK 2.3 is in 2014/Vulkan but Proton provides its own, so not wired. Non-Steam -> computed appid. UNTESTED as of build — this is the hypothesised fix for Tony's crash.
